mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INVESTMENT_PREFERENCES (CLIENTID, INVESTMENT_PURPOSE_ID, RISK_TOLERANCE_ID, INCOME_CATEGORY_ID, INVESTMENT_DURATION_ID, ACCEPTEDTERMS) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{investmentPurposeId}, #{riskToleranceId}, #{incomeCategoryId}, #{investmentDurationId}, #{acceptedTerms})
mapper.update: UPDATE INVESTMENT_PREFERENCES SET RISK_TOLERANCE_ID = #{riskToleranceId}, INCOME_CATEGORY_ID = #{incomeCategoryId}, INVESTMENT_PURPOSE_ID = #{investmentPurposeId}, INVESTMENT_DURATION_ID = #{investmentDurationId}, ACCEPTEDTERMS = #{acceptedTerms} WHERE CLIENTID = #{clientId}
